notes: significant gamma emission (curated); vector set to penetrating; decay modes/branching/daughters from ICRP-107/NUBASE2020/AME2020; decayEnergy_MeV are total Q-values from AME2020 atomic masses; specificActivity computed from half-life and atomic mass; decayHeat is an estimate (recoverable energy: alpha=Q, beta-~Q/3, beta+ adds annihilation, EC~5%; neutrino loss not fully modeled)
